title: Buster Keaton
quote: "When I have free time to watch a Buster Keaton movie, it means my day was sad and then became very happy and joyful."
description: O gênio da comédia silenciosa rankeado, do melhor ao... também ótimo, pois ele é incrível.

title: Cinematic Experiences of 2026
quote: "This list contains the films I had the opportunity to see on the big screen in 2026."
description: Os filmes que tive o privilégio de vivenciar na tela grande (cinema de rua e shoppings).

title: Films That Changed the Perception of Life
quote: "These are films that, when I watched them, ended up changing a bit of who I am."
description: Esses são os filmes que moldaram quem eu sou e me ajudaram em momentos difíceis.
